result.markdown: --- title: "Week 5: Exponential smoothing" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## What you will learn this week * Simple exponential smoothing and corresponding ETS models * Methods with trend and corresponding ETS models * ETS model notation ## Pre-seminar activities Read [Sections 8.1-8.4 of the textbook](https://otexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth.html) and watch all embedded videos ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 1-5 from [Section 8.8](https://otexts.com/fpp3/expsmooth-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## Assignments * [IA2](../assignments/A2.qmd) is due on Thursday 02 April. * [GA2](../assignments/G2.qmd) is due on Tuesday 14 April. * [IA3](../assignments/A3.qmd) is due on Friday 24 April. ## Weekly quiz * [Week 5 quiz](https://learning.monash.edu/mod/quiz/view.php?id=3868) is due on Wednesday 01 April.
